posts.author: kkronline
posts.text: Response from CFO. Dear Sir Thank you for your continued interest in Beacon Trusteeship Limited and for your encouraging words regarding the Company’s performance. We appreciate your thoughtful questions and are pleased to provide our responses below: What percentage of clients use two or more Beacon services today versus three years ago? Reply: As on date only 2% of BT’s clients use other services. What operating margin can Beacon sustainably achieve at ₹100 crore revenue? Reply: Similar operating margins are achievable even at a scale of 100 Cr What revenue contribution do acquired subsidiar…
